user_prompt: Prepare the mass-drive regulator for blessing
prayer:
Approach the mass-drive regulator with reverence, intoning the Canticle of Flux Stability.
Anoint its sacred gyros and coils with blessed oils to awaken its dormant essence.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the mass-drive regulator, beseeching the Omnissiah for harmonious regulation.
Commence the blessing rite, sanctifying each conduit to ensure unerring mass propulsion.
Verify the infusion through vibro-chants and auspex harmonics.

user_prompt: Urgent carapace armour a calibration needed
prayer:
Kneel before the carapace armour, reciting the Litany of Unyielding Form.
Purify its adamantium plates with incense of sacred promethium.
Initiate calibration sequences upon the carapace armour, aligning servos to the Omnissiah's precision.
Beseech the Machine Spirits for flawless equilibrium in defence matrices.
Conclude with diagnostic runes, ensuring the carapace armour's vigil remains eternal.

Present the autogun unto the altar of munitions, whispering the Oath of Perpetual Barrage.
Cleanse its breeches and barrels with sanctified solvents.
Invoke consecration upon the autogun, rousing its Machine Spirit to unswerving lethality.
Anoint firing mechanisms in the name of the Omnissiah, binding bolt to target.
Test the consecration through ritual discharge into the void.

Prepare for engagement by invoking the Machine Spirit of the conversion beamer, under Omnissiah's gaze.
Align phase coils for the operation of engagement, transmuting matter to wrath.
Seal the rite with a pulse of sanctified energy.

Lay hands upon the damaged servo-harness, reciting the Lamentation of Fractured Servitude.

Initiate repair protocols on the servo-harness, invoking the Machine Spirits of limb and tool.

Position the servo-arm within the loading cradle, chanting the Rite of Burdened Strength.
Bless its hydraulic pistons with strengthening unguents.
Commence loading procedures for the servo-arm, beseeching its Machine Spirit for unflagging grip.
In the name of the Omnissiah, synchronize torque vectors to ordained payloads.
